title: Creamy German Eggplant Stir-fry
description: A fresh and dense German dish featuring poached eggplants cooked with cream of tartar for a creamy sauce that complements any meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Rinse eggplants under cold water.
Using a sharp knife, score the skin of each eggplant in a crisscross pattern. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 30-35 minutes or until tender and lightly browned. Let cool slightly before peeling off the skin from the inside out.
Meanwhile, in a blender, combine peeled eggplants with lemon juice, garlic, salt, pepper, and cream of tartar. Blend until smooth.
Return the blended mixture to a pot over medium heat. Add olive oil and stir continuously for 2-3 minutes to thicken slightly without burning.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired and serve hot as a main dish or side.
